description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named docs that triggers when the CMake workflow run completes. Run a single ubuntu-latest job if the repository owner is 'liblava' and the workflow run was successful. In this job, check out the repository, run Doxygen with a specified configuration, install Doxybook2, generate documentation with Doxybook2, and deploy it to the liblava.github.io repository using a personal access token.
